body.loggingIn: Checking the current New API session and preparing verification if it is needed.
body.credentialsMissing: Add a New API login username and password in Settings before session-assisted verification can run.
body.loginTwoFactor: The New API login step requires a verification code before the browser-backed admin session can continue.
body.secureVerification: The admin session is logged in, but New API still requires a secure verification code before hidden channel keys can be read.
body.passkeyManual: This account currently exposes passkey verification for the secure step. Complete the passkey check on the site, then return here and retry.
body.successSettings: The New API login and verification flow completed successfully. You can now continue with actions that require login and verification.
body.successToken: Verification succeeded for {{label}}. The managed-site status has been refreshed.
body.successChannel: Verification succeeded for {{label}}. The real channel key has been loaded.
body.failure: The New API verification flow could not be completed.

messages.starting: Starting the New API verification flow...
messages.finishing: Finalizing the New API session check...
messages.missingBaseUrl: Add the New API base URL before testing the session flow.

hints.manualFallback: Manual code entry stays available even when automatic TOTP is configured.
hints.passkey: Open the site, complete the passkey prompt there, then come back here and retry.
